digest.component_or_area: autolander bot Gerrit credential + ACL provisioning
propositions: Provision the autolander bot's Gerrit HTTP token as an SSM SecureString at /rebar/prod/autolander-gerrit-token via the existing for_each parameter set, with no IAM change since it falls under the already-granted prefix.
fetch-secrets.sh must materialize the token into the shared .env as AUTOLANDER_GERRIT_TOKEN using required fail-fast get_param so a missing token aborts boot.
No new submit grant is needed because RebarBotNava is already in Contributors which holds Submit, and inherited submit is eclipsed by exclusiveGroupPermissions = submit.
Grant the Rebase access right to group Contributors on the rebar project's refs/heads/* in its own refs/meta/config, not All-Projects and not a global capability.
On-behalf rebase requires no extra grant since it checks the original uploader who already holds the right.

smoke-check-autolander.sh runs three read-only provisioning checks (auth 200, Contributors membership, rebase ACL present) and setup-project.sh remains idempotent, without creating or submitting a change.
